name: motion-text-morph
title: Text Morph
author: Motion Primitives
description: Morphs matching characters between successive text strings.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils for source-batch and install-target portability.
Rendered the updated text as one static semantic node when reduced motion is requested.
Adjusted TypeScript annotations for the unified React 19 and Motion 12 catalog host without changing runtime behavior.

credits: Motion Primitives docs cite the Family app as inspiration.

modifications.change: Changed the local utility import and added an immediate-text reduced-motion branch. Adjusted TypeScript annotations for the unified React 19 and Motion 12 catalog host without changing runtime behavior.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied helper and keep updated text readable without character layout motion. Compile several upstream Motion 11-era components safely in the shared catalog while preserving their rendered behavior and install API.
